paper_title: Nine-year record of Alnus pollen deposition in the Roztocze Region [SE Poland] with relation to vegetation data

methods.description: This method involves collecting and analyzing data on Alnus pollen deposition over a nine-year period across different sites in the Roztocze Region. The purpose is to understand the variability in pollen deposition across years and sites.

steps.description: Pollen infl ux values for alder calculated for all nine trapping sites in the years 1998-2006 are presented in Table 2.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate pollen influx values for alder from trapping sites data

steps.description: The average value of annual alder pollen deposition for the study area was calculated at 1368 grains cm -2.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate average annual alder pollen deposition

steps.description: In the peak years, the PI values significantly surpassed the average deposition.
steps.searchable_summary: identify peak years with PI values surpassing average
outputs: peak years with high PI values

steps.description: Taking into account the average values of Alnus pollen deposition at each of the monitoring sites (Tab.2), the highest PI was recorded at the sites 6 and 4 situated quite close to the patch of alder carr.
steps.searchable_summary: compare average pollen deposition values across sites
